title: Flowering Crops
description: Adds flowers to all crops once they're fully grown.
body:
**Flowering Crops** adds flowers to all crops when they're fully grown.

[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/flowering-crops)[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/flowering-crops)

![Flowering wheat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64dac6728d036905b7b901af6070997f01d35bb2.png)![Flowering potatoes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6dbab8dbc7265b79955cd0da763800d9efb1a953.png)![Flowering carrots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6dc11807f9f6e3ec3ca53d2d2be70b4e2f089d5.png)![Flowering beetroots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf3a19595b848504ef2a4428ebe252536f94d248.png)
